text: **Ordering nondeterminism**: member pubkeys are gathered into a `BTreeSet<String>` (`people.rs:14-24`) and iterated in that order — i.e., **sorted lexicographically by raw hex pubkey, not by slug/name/join-time**. Presence rows come from SQL `ORDER BY updated_at DESC` (most-recently-changed-first). Channels list is `channels.sort(); channels.dedup()` on the channel hash string (`build.rs:21-22`) — again hash-lexicographic, not name order.
